SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2019 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO FEB-20-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT.
